tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('memory/long_term/index.json')
data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
ii=data.get('item_inverted_index',{})
print('item_index_count', len(data.get('item_index',{})))
print('keyword_count', len(ii))
# sample first 80 keys
print('sample_keys:', list(ii.keys())[:80])
# top broad terms by doc freq
print('top_terms:')
for k,v in sorted(ii.items(), key=lambda kv: len(kv[1]), reverse=True)[:40]:
    print(k, len(v))
# suspicious short/chinese snippets samples
print('short_or_frag_samples:', [k for k in ii if len(k)<=3][:80])
PY
